$description: Confetti design tokens, W3C DTCG format. One group per skin+mode; values are fully resolved.

a16.$description: cream at 16% — the dark-mode counterpart to ink.a12

600.$description: canonical Ink — warm near-black, text and borders

none.$description: an explicit absence — variants that keep the border box without drawing an edge

hard-ink.$description: hard offset shadow — the sticker lift, no blur

hard-cream.$description: dark-mode counterpart — light offset against dark surfaces

subtle.$description: outer bound of the hand-placed sticker tilt — components scale this by a per-instance multiplier in -1..1

max.$description: outer bound of the hand-placed sticker angle

lift.$description: how far an interactive surface rises on hover

hero.$description: container-query driven headline, above the fixed ramp

display.$description: hero only — fluid, sits above h1

h6.$description: meets body size — weight and family carry the distinction

control.$description: 48px — height of a tappable control. Padding sets the horizontal rhythm; this sets the vertical.
